## What is your OS? 
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Mac

## What is your Python version?
Activate your environment (see [here](https://perfanalytics.github.io/pose2sim/#1-set-up-a-uv-environment)) and run `python -V`



## What is your library version?
Activate your environment (see [here](https://perfanalytics.github.io/pose2sim/#1-set-up-a-uv-environment)) and run `uv pip show pose2sim` (and `uv pip show sports2d` if relevant).
